pages.text: The Terrarium is a sealed multiblock that runs the whole frog loop on its own. Build the box, seal it, and pipe Slime Milk into the Controller: ceiling Sprinklers rain slimes down, frogs eat them, and the Froglights collect in the Hatch.

The shell is 7 wide, 7 deep, and 6 tall - any full block (glass works, so you can see in), or a block in the terrarium_shell tag like mud - around a 5x5x4 cavity. You can mix materials freely; the example below uses a mud floor, glass walls, and oak corner posts.$(br2)Each machine sits on a wall or the ceiling; its own page covers where it goes and how it works.

pages.name: The Terrarium
pages.text: Seal the shell, place the Controller, then look at it - it lights up when the structure is valid.
